docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-02-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-02-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF ANTHONY KIM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY TABITHA LANG VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. ORALLY STIPULATION TO JUDGE PRO TEM VIA ZOOM. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KIM, ANTHONY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED. SERVED APR-25-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY KIM, ANTHONY AIRBNB, INC
SC-109(AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR) TABITHA LANG FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,915.97 FILED BY KIM, ANTHONY AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-02-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM DEFENDANT GRANTED**
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-02-2023 - JUDGMENT.
